---
title: Manim Animations
---

```{python}
#| include: false
%load_ext manim
```

`Manim` is a animation library intially developed by the creator of the popular [3Blue1Brown](https://www.youtube.com/c/3blue1brown)
YouTube channel and used extensively in his videos. 

This page shows how Manim can be integrated with Quarto to create beautiful animations programmatically. 

## Examples

### Basic Example 

The example below show a very basic `manim` animatiom from code directly in this document. The code for the animation is shown in a seperate tab. 

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Animation

```{python}
#| echo: false
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

class CreateCircle(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        circle = Circle()  # create a circle
        circle.set_fill(PINK, opacity=0.5)  # set the color and transparency
        self.play(Create(circle))  # show the circle on screen

with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None CreateCircle",
    )

video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

## Code

The code below is identical to that used to render the animation. It is slightly more complex than 
what is just required for the animation. 

```python
#| echo: false

## Imports 
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

# Configuration
config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

# Manim animation definition
class CreateCircle(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        circle = Circle()  # create a circle
        circle.set_fill(PINK, opacity=0.5)  # set the color and transparency
        self.play(Create(circle))  # show the circle on screen

# Jupyter hack to run and capture the manim animation but surpressing additional outputs. 
with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None CreateCircle",
    )

# Display the animation
video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

In addition the code a cell containing the following must be included *before* the code cell

```python
#| include: false
%load_ext manim
```

As this is neccessary to configure the Jupyter-hack we're relying on. 

:::

### Less basic example: Element-wise addition

This example shows element-wise addition, a very common operation when using e.g. `numpy`. 

The `manim` code is more substantial than before - but so is the resulting animation.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Animation

```{python}
#| echo: false
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

class ElementWiseAddition(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.background_color = "#101820"

        title = Text("Element-wise addition", font_size=40, weight=BOLD)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        intro_title = Text("Element-wise addition", font_size=46, weight=BOLD)
        intro_subtitle = Text(
            "Combine matching positions",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_B,
        )
        intro_expression = MathTex(
            r"\begin{bmatrix}2\\-1\\3\end{bmatrix}",
            "+",
            r"\begin{bmatrix}4\\5\\-2\end{bmatrix}",
            "=",
            r"\begin{bmatrix}6\\4\\1\end{bmatrix}",
            font_size=46,
        )
        intro_expression[0].set_color(BLUE_C)
        intro_expression[2].set_color(GREEN_C)
        intro_expression[4].set_color(YELLOW_C)
        title_card = VGroup(intro_title, intro_subtitle, intro_expression)
        title_card.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.45)
        self.add(title_card)
        self.wait(1.0)

        left_values = [2, -1, 3]
        right_values = [4, 5, -2]
        result_values = [a + b for a, b in zip(left_values, right_values)]

        left = Matrix([[value] for value in left_values], h_buff=1.0)
        right = Matrix([[value] for value in right_values], h_buff=1.0)
        result = Matrix([[value] for value in result_values], h_buff=1.0)

        left.set_color(BLUE_C)
        right.set_color(GREEN_C)
        result.set_color(YELLOW_C)

        plus = MathTex("+", font_size=56)
        equals = MathTex("=", font_size=56)
        expression = VGroup(left, plus, right, equals, result).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.55)
        expression.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(UP * 0.15)

        left_label = Text("a", font_size=28, color=BLUE_C).next_to(left, DOWN)
        right_label = Text("b", font_size=28, color=GREEN_C).next_to(right, DOWN)
        result_label = Text("a + b", font_size=28, color=YELLOW_C).next_to(result, DOWN)

        self.play(
            ReplacementTransform(intro_title, title),
            FadeOut(intro_subtitle),
            FadeOut(intro_expression),
            run_time=0.8,
        )
        self.play(
            Create(left),
            FadeIn(plus),
            Create(right),
            FadeIn(equals),
            Create(result),
            FadeIn(left_label, right_label, result_label),
        )
        self.wait(0.4)

        result_entries = result.get_entries()
        for index, (a_value, b_value, sum_value) in enumerate(
            zip(left_values, right_values, result_values)
        ):
            left_entry = left.get_entries()[index]
            right_entry = right.get_entries()[index]
            result_entry = result_entries[index]

            guide = SurroundingRectangle(
                VGroup(left_entry, right_entry, result_entry),
                color=WHITE,
                buff=0.18,
            )
            calculation = MathTex(
                f"{a_value}", "+", f"{b_value}", "=", f"{sum_value}",
                font_size=40,
            )
            calculation[0].set_color(BLUE_C)
            calculation[2].set_color(GREEN_C)
            calculation[4].set_color(YELLOW_C)
            calculation.next_to(expression, DOWN, buff=0.75)

            left_copy = left_entry.copy()
            right_copy = right_entry.copy()

            self.play(Create(guide), run_time=0.3)
            self.play(
                TransformFromCopy(left_entry, calculation[0]),
                FadeIn(calculation[1]),
                TransformFromCopy(right_entry, calculation[2]),
                FadeIn(calculation[3]),
                run_time=0.7,
            )
            self.play(
                TransformFromCopy(VGroup(left_copy, right_copy), calculation[4]),
                result_entry.animate.set_color(YELLOW),
                run_time=0.7,
            )
            self.wait(0.25)
            self.play(FadeOut(guide), FadeOut(calculation), run_time=0.35)

        final_rule = Text(
            "Same position, same operation",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_B,
        ).next_to(expression, DOWN, buff=0.75)
        self.play(FadeIn(final_rule), result.animate.scale(1.08))
        self.wait(1.2)

with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None ElementWiseAddition",
    )

video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

## Code

```python
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

class ElementWiseAddition(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.background_color = "#101820"

        title = Text("Element-wise addition", font_size=40, weight=BOLD)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        intro_title = Text("Element-wise addition", font_size=46, weight=BOLD)
        intro_subtitle = Text(
            "Combine matching positions",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_B,
        )
        intro_expression = MathTex(
            r"\begin{bmatrix}2\\-1\\3\end{bmatrix}",
            "+",
            r"\begin{bmatrix}4\\5\\-2\end{bmatrix}",
            "=",
            r"\begin{bmatrix}6\\4\\1\end{bmatrix}",
            font_size=46,
        )
        intro_expression[0].set_color(BLUE_C)
        intro_expression[2].set_color(GREEN_C)
        intro_expression[4].set_color(YELLOW_C)
        title_card = VGroup(intro_title, intro_subtitle, intro_expression)
        title_card.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.45)
        self.add(title_card)
        self.wait(1.0)

        left_values = [2, -1, 3]
        right_values = [4, 5, -2]
        result_values = [a + b for a, b in zip(left_values, right_values)]

        left = Matrix([[value] for value in left_values], h_buff=1.0)
        right = Matrix([[value] for value in right_values], h_buff=1.0)
        result = Matrix([[value] for value in result_values], h_buff=1.0)

        left.set_color(BLUE_C)
        right.set_color(GREEN_C)
        result.set_color(YELLOW_C)

        plus = MathTex("+", font_size=56)
        equals = MathTex("=", font_size=56)
        expression = VGroup(left, plus, right, equals, result).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.55)
        expression.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(UP * 0.15)

        left_label = Text("a", font_size=28, color=BLUE_C).next_to(left, DOWN)
        right_label = Text("b", font_size=28, color=GREEN_C).next_to(right, DOWN)
        result_label = Text("a + b", font_size=28, color=YELLOW_C).next_to(result, DOWN)

        self.play(
            ReplacementTransform(intro_title, title),
            FadeOut(intro_subtitle),
            FadeOut(intro_expression),
            run_time=0.8,
        )
        self.play(
            Create(left),
            FadeIn(plus),
            Create(right),
            FadeIn(equals),
            Create(result),
            FadeIn(left_label, right_label, result_label),
        )
        self.wait(0.4)

        result_entries = result.get_entries()
        for index, (a_value, b_value, sum_value) in enumerate(
            zip(left_values, right_values, result_values)
        ):
            left_entry = left.get_entries()[index]
            right_entry = right.get_entries()[index]
            result_entry = result_entries[index]

            guide = SurroundingRectangle(
                VGroup(left_entry, right_entry, result_entry),
                color=WHITE,
                buff=0.18,
            )
            calculation = MathTex(
                f"{a_value}", "+", f"{b_value}", "=", f"{sum_value}",
                font_size=40,
            )
            calculation[0].set_color(BLUE_C)
            calculation[2].set_color(GREEN_C)
            calculation[4].set_color(YELLOW_C)
            calculation.next_to(expression, DOWN, buff=0.75)

            left_copy = left_entry.copy()
            right_copy = right_entry.copy()

            self.play(Create(guide), run_time=0.3)
            self.play(
                TransformFromCopy(left_entry, calculation[0]),
                FadeIn(calculation[1]),
                TransformFromCopy(right_entry, calculation[2]),
                FadeIn(calculation[3]),
                run_time=0.7,
            )
            self.play(
                TransformFromCopy(VGroup(left_copy, right_copy), calculation[4]),
                result_entry.animate.set_color(YELLOW),
                run_time=0.7,
            )
            self.wait(0.25)
            self.play(FadeOut(guide), FadeOut(calculation), run_time=0.35)

        final_rule = Text(
            "Same position, same operation",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_B,
        ).next_to(expression, DOWN, buff=0.75)
        self.play(FadeIn(final_rule), result.animate.scale(1.08))
        self.wait(1.2)

with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None ElementWiseAddition",
    )

video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

:::

### Biological Example: Codon to protein

This animation shows how mRNA is translated into amino acids. This is substantially more invovled than 
the basic example. However, LLM's are quite good at this type of task (this was made using Codex).

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Animation

```{python}
#| echo: false
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

class CodonToProtein(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.background_color = "#0d1b1e"

        title = Text("Codon to protein", font_size=40, weight=BOLD)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        intro_title = Text("Codon to protein", font_size=46, weight=BOLD)
        intro_subtitle = Text(
            "Translate mRNA triplets into amino acids",
            font_size=27,
            color=GRAY_B,
        )
        intro_mrna = Text("AUG  GCU  UUC  GAA  UAG", font_size=34, color=YELLOW)
        intro_arrow = MathTex("\\Downarrow", font_size=42, color=GRAY_A)
        intro_protein = Text("Met - Ala - Phe - Glu - Stop", font_size=31, color=TEAL_C)
        title_card = VGroup(
            intro_title,
            intro_subtitle,
            intro_mrna,
            intro_arrow,
            intro_protein,
        )
        title_card.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.32)
        self.add(title_card)
        self.wait(1.0)

        sequence = "AUGGCUUUCGAAUAG"
        codons = ["AUG", "GCU", "UUC", "GAA", "UAG"]
        amino_acids = ["Met", "Ala", "Phe", "Glu", "Stop"]
        amino_colors = [TEAL_C, BLUE_C, PURPLE_C, ORANGE, RED_C]

        bases = VGroup()
        for base in sequence:
            box = RoundedRectangle(
                width=0.45,
                height=0.48,
                corner_radius=0.05,
                stroke_color=GRAY_A,
                fill_color="#142f35",
                fill_opacity=1,
            )
            label = Text(base, font_size=24, color=WHITE)
            bases.add(VGroup(box, label))

        bases.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.08)
        bases.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(UP * 1.35)

        mrna_label = Text("mRNA", font_size=24, color=GRAY_B).next_to(bases, LEFT, buff=0.35)
        ribosome = RoundedRectangle(
            width=2.25,
            height=1.15,
            corner_radius=0.18,
            stroke_color=YELLOW_C,
            fill_color="#3a3f2d",
            fill_opacity=0.75,
        )
        ribosome.move_to(bases[1].get_center()).shift(DOWN * 0.1)
        ribosome_label = Text("ribosome", font_size=22, color=YELLOW_C)
        ribosome_label.next_to(ribosome, DOWN, buff=0.12)

        codon_window = SurroundingRectangle(
            VGroup(*bases[:3]),
            color=YELLOW,
            buff=0.08,
        )

        protein_count = len(amino_acids) - 1
        amino_spacing = 1.05
        chain_center = DOWN * 2.0
        chain_origin = chain_center + LEFT * ((protein_count - 1) * amino_spacing / 2)
        protein_label = Text("protein", font_size=24, color=GRAY_B)
        protein_label.next_to(chain_center + LEFT * 2.35, LEFT, buff=0.0)
        peptide_chain = VGroup()

        self.play(
            ReplacementTransform(intro_title, title),
            FadeOut(intro_subtitle),
            FadeOut(intro_mrna),
            FadeOut(intro_arrow),
            FadeOut(intro_protein),
            run_time=0.8,
        )
        self.play(FadeIn(mrna_label), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(base) for base in bases], lag_ratio=0.04))
        self.play(FadeIn(ribosome), FadeIn(ribosome_label), Create(codon_window))
        self.wait(0.4)

        previous_amino = None
        for index, (codon, amino_acid, color) in enumerate(
            zip(codons, amino_acids, amino_colors)
        ):
            codon_group = VGroup(*bases[index * 3 : index * 3 + 3])
            target_center = codon_group.get_center()
            target_window = SurroundingRectangle(codon_group, color=YELLOW, buff=0.08)

            if index > 0:
                self.play(
                    ribosome.animate.move_to(target_center).shift(DOWN * 0.1),
                    Transform(codon_window, target_window),
                    run_time=0.75,
                )

            codon_text = Text(codon, font_size=34, color=YELLOW)
            codon_text.next_to(codon_group, DOWN, buff=0.95)

            if amino_acid == "Stop":
                stop_marker = Text("translation stops", font_size=30, color=RED_C)
                stop_marker.next_to(codon_text, DOWN, buff=0.25)
                self.play(Indicate(codon_group, color=RED_C), FadeIn(codon_text))
                self.play(FadeIn(stop_marker), ribosome.animate.set_stroke(RED_C))
                self.wait(1.1)
                self.play(FadeOut(codon_text), FadeOut(stop_marker))
                break

            amino_circle = Circle(
                radius=0.34,
                stroke_color=color,
                fill_color=color,
                fill_opacity=0.85,
            )
            amino_label = Text(amino_acid, font_size=22, color=WHITE)
            amino = VGroup(amino_circle, amino_label)
            amino.move_to(chain_origin + RIGHT * index * amino_spacing)

            codon_to_amino = MathTex(
                codon,
                "\\rightarrow",
                amino_acid,
                font_size=36,
            )
            codon_to_amino[0].set_color(YELLOW)
            codon_to_amino[2].set_color(color)
            codon_to_amino.next_to(codon_group, DOWN, buff=0.95)

            self.play(Indicate(codon_group, color=YELLOW), FadeIn(codon_to_amino))
            self.play(TransformFromCopy(codon_group, amino), run_time=0.8)

            if previous_amino is not None:
                bond = Line(
                    previous_amino.get_right(),
                    amino.get_left(),
                    color=GRAY_A,
                    stroke_width=5,
                )
                peptide_chain.add(bond)
                self.play(Create(bond), run_time=0.25)

            peptide_chain.add(amino)
            self.play(FadeOut(codon_to_amino), run_time=0.3)
            previous_amino = amino

        complete = Text(
            "Each triplet codon specifies one amino acid",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_A,
        )
        complete.next_to(peptide_chain, DOWN, buff=0.55)
        complete.set_x(0)
        self.play(FadeIn(protein_label), FadeIn(complete))
        self.play(peptide_chain.animate.scale(1.08), run_time=0.6)
        self.wait(1.2)

with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None CodonToProtein",
    )

video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

## Code

```python
#| echo: false
from manim import *
from IPython.utils.capture import capture_output

config.media_width = "100%"
config.media_embed = True

class CodonToProtein(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.background_color = "#0d1b1e"

        title = Text("Codon to protein", font_size=40, weight=BOLD)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        intro_title = Text("Codon to protein", font_size=46, weight=BOLD)
        intro_subtitle = Text(
            "Translate mRNA triplets into amino acids",
            font_size=27,
            color=GRAY_B,
        )
        intro_mrna = Text("AUG  GCU  UUC  GAA  UAG", font_size=34, color=YELLOW)
        intro_arrow = MathTex("\\Downarrow", font_size=42, color=GRAY_A)
        intro_protein = Text("Met - Ala - Phe - Glu - Stop", font_size=31, color=TEAL_C)
        title_card = VGroup(
            intro_title,
            intro_subtitle,
            intro_mrna,
            intro_arrow,
            intro_protein,
        )
        title_card.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.32)
        self.add(title_card)
        self.wait(1.0)

        sequence = "AUGGCUUUCGAAUAG"
        codons = ["AUG", "GCU", "UUC", "GAA", "UAG"]
        amino_acids = ["Met", "Ala", "Phe", "Glu", "Stop"]
        amino_colors = [TEAL_C, BLUE_C, PURPLE_C, ORANGE, RED_C]

        bases = VGroup()
        for base in sequence:
            box = RoundedRectangle(
                width=0.45,
                height=0.48,
                corner_radius=0.05,
                stroke_color=GRAY_A,
                fill_color="#142f35",
                fill_opacity=1,
            )
            label = Text(base, font_size=24, color=WHITE)
            bases.add(VGroup(box, label))

        bases.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.08)
        bases.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(UP * 1.35)

        mrna_label = Text("mRNA", font_size=24, color=GRAY_B).next_to(bases, LEFT, buff=0.35)
        ribosome = RoundedRectangle(
            width=2.25,
            height=1.15,
            corner_radius=0.18,
            stroke_color=YELLOW_C,
            fill_color="#3a3f2d",
            fill_opacity=0.75,
        )
        ribosome.move_to(bases[1].get_center()).shift(DOWN * 0.1)
        ribosome_label = Text("ribosome", font_size=22, color=YELLOW_C)
        ribosome_label.next_to(ribosome, DOWN, buff=0.12)

        codon_window = SurroundingRectangle(
            VGroup(*bases[:3]),
            color=YELLOW,
            buff=0.08,
        )

        protein_count = len(amino_acids) - 1
        amino_spacing = 1.05
        chain_center = DOWN * 2.0
        chain_origin = chain_center + LEFT * ((protein_count - 1) * amino_spacing / 2)
        protein_label = Text("protein", font_size=24, color=GRAY_B)
        protein_label.next_to(chain_center + LEFT * 2.35, LEFT, buff=0.0)
        peptide_chain = VGroup()

        self.play(
            ReplacementTransform(intro_title, title),
            FadeOut(intro_subtitle),
            FadeOut(intro_mrna),
            FadeOut(intro_arrow),
            FadeOut(intro_protein),
            run_time=0.8,
        )
        self.play(FadeIn(mrna_label), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(base) for base in bases], lag_ratio=0.04))
        self.play(FadeIn(ribosome), FadeIn(ribosome_label), Create(codon_window))
        self.wait(0.4)

        previous_amino = None
        for index, (codon, amino_acid, color) in enumerate(
            zip(codons, amino_acids, amino_colors)
        ):
            codon_group = VGroup(*bases[index * 3 : index * 3 + 3])
            target_center = codon_group.get_center()
            target_window = SurroundingRectangle(codon_group, color=YELLOW, buff=0.08)

            if index > 0:
                self.play(
                    ribosome.animate.move_to(target_center).shift(DOWN * 0.1),
                    Transform(codon_window, target_window),
                    run_time=0.75,
                )

            codon_text = Text(codon, font_size=34, color=YELLOW)
            codon_text.next_to(codon_group, DOWN, buff=0.95)

            if amino_acid == "Stop":
                stop_marker = Text("translation stops", font_size=30, color=RED_C)
                stop_marker.next_to(codon_text, DOWN, buff=0.25)
                self.play(Indicate(codon_group, color=RED_C), FadeIn(codon_text))
                self.play(FadeIn(stop_marker), ribosome.animate.set_stroke(RED_C))
                self.wait(1.1)
                self.play(FadeOut(codon_text), FadeOut(stop_marker))
                break

            amino_circle = Circle(
                radius=0.34,
                stroke_color=color,
                fill_color=color,
                fill_opacity=0.85,
            )
            amino_label = Text(amino_acid, font_size=22, color=WHITE)
            amino = VGroup(amino_circle, amino_label)
            amino.move_to(chain_origin + RIGHT * index * amino_spacing)

            codon_to_amino = MathTex(
                codon,
                "\\rightarrow",
                amino_acid,
                font_size=36,
            )
            codon_to_amino[0].set_color(YELLOW)
            codon_to_amino[2].set_color(color)
            codon_to_amino.next_to(codon_group, DOWN, buff=0.95)

            self.play(Indicate(codon_group, color=YELLOW), FadeIn(codon_to_amino))
            self.play(TransformFromCopy(codon_group, amino), run_time=0.8)

            if previous_amino is not None:
                bond = Line(
                    previous_amino.get_right(),
                    amino.get_left(),
                    color=GRAY_A,
                    stroke_width=5,
                )
                peptide_chain.add(bond)
                self.play(Create(bond), run_time=0.25)

            peptide_chain.add(amino)
            self.play(FadeOut(codon_to_amino), run_time=0.3)
            previous_amino = amino

        complete = Text(
            "Each triplet codon specifies one amino acid",
            font_size=28,
            color=GRAY_A,
        )
        complete.next_to(peptide_chain, DOWN, buff=0.55)
        complete.set_x(0)
        self.play(FadeIn(protein_label), FadeIn(complete))
        self.play(peptide_chain.animate.scale(1.08), run_time=0.6)
        self.wait(1.2)

with capture_output() as captured:
    get_ipython().run_line_magic(
        "manim",
        "-qh -v WARNING --progress_bar None CodonToProtein",
    )

video = captured.outputs[-1]
video.data["text/html"] = (
    video.data["text/html"]
    .replace(" autoplay", "")
    .replace(" loop", "")
)
video.display()
```

:::


## Technical 

To include `manim` animations the `pixi` environemnt needs to have manim registered as a dependency, 
if it isn't then it can be added with

```bash
pixi add manim
```

Additionally we need to make sure a LaTeX installation is available, this can be done using this task 

```default
[tasks.install-tinytex]
cmd = "quarto install tinytex --no-prompt && export PATH=\"$HOME/.TinyTeX/bin/x86_64-linux:$PATH\" && tlmgr install dvisvgm standalone preview"
description = "Install TinyTeX and Manim TeX dependencies for CI"
```
Which can be added to `pixi.toml` and run using `pixi r install-tinytex`. 

Then if the `manim` source code should be part of the document we need to enable 
the `manim` Jupyter interface, this is done by having a cell like 

```python
#| include: false
%load_ext manim
```
Where the `include: false`-line tells Quarto to not display either the cell or the output of the cell when 
rendering but the code in the cell is run. Then code-blocks like those shown for the examples above 
can be inserted and `manim` animations will be rendered and shown. 

Alternatively, the animations can be scripted and the produced videos can be included using 
the Quarto shortcode 

```default
{{{< video path/to/video.mp4 >}}}
```
If a project includes many animations this is probably preferable to keep rendering time down.

### CI 

If the animations are rendered as part of the CI the workflow should ensure that the LaTeX environemnt is installed, 
this can be done by adding the following to the `.yml`-file (e.g. `publish.yml`).

```default
- name: Install TinyTeX
run: |
    pixi run install-tinytex
    echo "$HOME/.TinyTeX/bin/x86_64-linux" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"
```
